---
title: "garch"
author: "Lydia Bao"
date: "12/9/2024"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# GARCH Model

This is an R Markdown document for conducting GARCH models respectively.

### Load data
```{r}
library(readr)

# Set the path to your data file
data_path <- "log_return.csv"

# Import the log returns data
log_returns_data <- read_csv(data_path)

# Display the first few rows of the data
head(log_returns_data)
```

# Model pipeline
```{r}
# 加载必要的库
library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(TTR)
library(FinTS)
library(tseries)
library(rugarch)

# 定义一个函数，用于对单个汇率进行完整的GARCH分析
analyze_garch <- function(data, exchange_rate, external_regressor) {
  
  # 1. 绘制 Q-Q 图，检查对数收益率的分布
  qqPlot(data[[exchange_rate]], main = paste("Q-Q Plot of", exchange_rate, "Log Returns"))
  
  # 2. 绘制时间序列图
  ggplot(data, aes(x = Date, y = .data[[exchange_rate]])) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = paste(exchange_rate, "Log Returns Over Time"),
         x = "Date", y = "Log Return") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  # 3. 计算滚动标准差并绘制滚动波动性图
  data$Rolling_SD <- runSD(data[[exchange_rate]], n = 30)
  ggplot(data, aes(x = Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[exchange_rate]]), color = "blue") +
    geom_line(aes(y = Rolling_SD), color = "red") +
    labs(title = paste(exchange_rate, "Log Returns and Rolling Standard Deviation"),
         x = "Date", y = "Value") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  # 4. 绘制自相关函数（ACF）图
  acf(data[[exchange_rate]], main = paste("ACF of", exchange_rate, "Log Returns"))
  acf(data[[exchange_rate]]^2, main = paste("ACF of Squared", exchange_rate, "Log Returns"))
  
  # 5. ARCH效应检验
  arch_test <- ArchTest(data[[exchange_rate]], lags = 5)
  print(paste("ARCH Test for", exchange_rate))
  print(arch_test)
  
  # 6. 平稳性检验（ADF检验）
  adf_result <- adf.test(data[[exchange_rate]])
  print(paste("ADF Test for", exchange_rate))
  print(adf_result)
  
  # 7. 构建GARCH模型
  spec <- ugarchspec(
    variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
    mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(0, 0), external.regressors = as.matrix(data[[external_regressor]])),
    distribution.model = "norm"
  )
  fit <- ugarchfit(spec, data = data[[exchange_rate]])
  print(paste("GARCH Model Results for", exchange_rate))
  print(fit)
  
  # 8. 提取参数
  params <- coef(fit)
  print(paste("GARCH Parameters for", exchange_rate))
  print(params)
  
  # 9. 检查标准化残差的自相关性
  residuals <- residuals(fit, standardize = TRUE)
  acf(residuals, main = paste("ACF of Standardized Residuals for", exchange_rate))
  
  # 10. 残差ARCH效应检验
  arch_test <- ArchTest(residuals, lags = 5)
  print(paste("ARCH Test for Residuals of", exchange_rate))
  print(arch_test)
  
  # 返回模型结果
  return(list(fit = fit, params = params, residuals = residuals))
}
```

## 针对不同的汇率完成分析
```{r}
usd_rub_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_RUB", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```

```{r}
usd_nok_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_NOK", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```

```{r}
usd_cad_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_CAD", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```

```{r}
usd_sar_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_SAR", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```


```{r}
usd_jpy_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_JPY", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```


```{r}
usd_cny_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_CNY", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```


```{r}
usd_inr_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_INR", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```


```{r}
usd_eur_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_EUR", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```


```{r}
usd_brl_results <- analyze_garch(data = log_returns_data, exchange_rate = "USD_BRL", external_regressor = "Brent_Crude")
```

## Result Analysis
```{r}
exchange_rates <- c("USD_RUB", "USD_NOK", "USD_SAR", "USD_CAD", "USD_JPY", "USD_CNY", "USD_INR", "USD_EUR", "USD_BRL")

# 手动提取系数
gamma_coefficients <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("USD_RUB", "USD_NOK", "USD_SAR", "USD_CAD", 
               "USD_JPY", "USD_CNY", "USD_INR", "USD_EUR", "USD_BRL"),
  Gamma = c(usd_rub_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_nok_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_sar_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_cad_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_jpy_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_cny_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_inr_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_eur_results$params["mxreg1"],
            usd_brl_results$params["mxreg1"])
)

# 打印结果
print(gamma_coefficients)

# 可视化展示
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(gamma_coefficients, aes(x = Variable, y = Gamma)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Impact of Oil Price on Exchange Rate Volatility", x = "Exchange Rate", y = "Gamma Coefficient") +
  theme_minimal()
```
